headline: Senior Python Engineer
summary: Backend-focused software engineer with 7 years building reliable, well-tested services at scale. Comfortable owning features end to end, from API design to deployment on AWS.

experiences.title: Senior Backend Engineer
highlights: Designed and shipped FastAPI microservices handling 2M+ requests/day with p99 < 120ms.
Led migration from a monolith to containerized services on AWS EKS, cutting deploy time 70%.
Introduced contract tests and CI gating that reduced production incidents by 40%.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built ETL pipelines in Python processing 500GB/day into PostgreSQL and Redshift.
Implemented async job workers with Redis and Celery, improving throughput 3x.
